free_text: A multifoil carbon polarimeter for protons
of carbon as an analyzer, MWPC telescopes and plastic
scintillators. Polarimeter named MUSASHI using a
carbon analyser has been newly constructed for
measurements of the polarization of protons in the
energy range 20-84 MeV at the RCNP Osata Univ. It
A carbon target of 40 or 1.5 mg/cm2 thickness
